variables.headline: Another one closed.
variables.thanks: Thank you to the Alvarez family

visuals.svg: <svg width='1080' height='1080' viewBox='0 0 1080 1080' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><linearGradient id='sv' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0' stop-color='#0C130E' stop-opacity='0.5'/><stop offset='0.34' stop-color='#0C130E' stop-opacity='0.08'/><stop offset='0.62' stop-color='#0C130E' stop-opacity='0.46'/><stop offset='1' stop-color='#0C130E' stop-opacity='0.97'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='1080' height='1080' fill='url(#sv)'/></svg>

<svg width='380' height='208' viewBox='0 0 380 208' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='8' y='8' width='364' height='192' rx='18' fill='none' stroke='{{accent}}' stroke-opacity='0.92' stroke-width='6'/><rect x='22' y='22' width='336' height='164' rx='12' fill='none' stroke='{{accent}}' stroke-opacity='0.5' stroke-width='2'/><text x='190' y='118' font-family='Archivo, Arial' font-size='96' font-weight='800' letter-spacing='6' fill='{{accent}}' text-anchor='middle'>{{stamp}}</text><text x='190' y='162' font-family='Space Grotesk, Arial' font-size='16' font-weight='600' letter-spacing='7' fill='{{accent}}' text-anchor='middle'>OFFICIALLY</text></svg>

<svg width='540' height='72' viewBox='0 0 540 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='0' y='0' width='540' height='72' rx='36' fill='#0B1710' fill-opacity='0.78' stroke='#FFFFFF' stroke-opacity='0.14' stroke-width='1.2'/><circle cx='42' cy='36' r='24' fill='{{accent}}'/><text x='42' y='44' font-family='Archivo, Arial' font-size='21' font-weight='800' fill='#0C130E' text-anchor='middle'>{{agentInitials}}</text><text x='84' y='32' font-family='Space Grotesk, Arial' font-size='23' font-weight='700' fill='#F2FBF5'>{{agentName}}</text><text x='84' y='56' font-family='Space Grotesk, Arial' font-size='17' font-weight='500' letter-spacing='2' fill='#8FB49D'>{{brand}}</text></svg>
